title: BT skill-sync: add generate-claude-md mode
description: First child of the CLAUDE.md distribution arc (d-2026-07-02-eb-claude-md-distribution-surface). Extends business-tools' tools/skill-sync/skill-sync.py with a new emit_claude_md() mode that projects the CLI-actionable subset of SR canonical state into a generated repo-root CLAUDE.md: each landed rule instance's 'statement' field (confirmed present and required on rule.schema.json v1.2.0 via direct schema read, not assumed) plus each canonical skill's SKILL.md frontmatter 'description' field (the trigger condition). This targets Claude Code specifically, which has no path to account-level Memory and only reads repo-local substrate.

outputs.description: emit_claude_md() added to skill-sync.py as a new additive mode alongside the existing zip/eb-copy emitters, reusing verify_sr()'s pinned-SHA + clean-tree gate.
acceptanceCriteria: New CLI flag (e.g. --emit-claude-md) added to skill-sync.py's argparse surface, additive only — existing --dry-run, zip, and eb-copy behavior unchanged
Reads every instance under sr_root/schemas/_instances/rules/*.json and extracts id, title, and the verbatim 'statement' field for each
Reads SKILL.md YAML frontmatter for every skill in SKILL_SET and extracts the verbatim 'description' field (trigger condition)
Emits one generated CLAUDE.md at a configurable --claude-md-target path
Generated CLAUDE.md carries a provenance footer (SR source SHA + skill-sync version), matching the existing '<!-- generated by ... -->' convention used in SKILL.md output
--dry-run reports WOULD WRITE with source content hashes, without touching the filesystem, consistent with emit_zip/emit_eb_copy's existing dry-run contract
Rule statements and skill trigger descriptions are reproduced verbatim in the generated file — no paraphrase or summarization (per org/substrate-before-write skill's no-drift discipline)

preMerge: ajv canonical 3-flag PASS against deliverable.schema.json v1.2.0 for this instance
Generated CLAUDE.md sample spot-checked against at least one rule statement and one skill description for verbatim match (no drift)
Existing skill-sync.py zip/eb-copy dry-run and execute paths regression-checked unaffected

transitions.trigger: First child of arc parent d-2026-07-02-eb-claude-md-distribution-surface; sequenced to land before the EB child since EB consumes this mode's output.

notes: EXPECTED_SR_SHA pin staleness in skill-sync.py (currently 0b20177, several commits behind current SR main) is a pre-existing, separate concern out of scope for this deliverable — not to be bundled in here. This deliverable's BT-side execution PR must merge before d-2026-07-02-eb-claude-md-landing can consume emit_claude_md()'s output.
